evidence.claim: Used XGBoost and LightGBM to train and ship ranking models
evidence.source_text: Trained and shipped multiple ranking models for our product's discovery feed using XGBoost and LightGBM.

evidence.claim: Led team in migrating keyword-search-based product to embedding-based retrieval
evidence.source_text: Recently, I led the team that migrated our keyword-search-based product to embedding-based retrieval.

evidence.claim: Owned offline-online correlation analysis for A/B test metrics
evidence.source_text: Owned the offline-online correlation analysis that determined which offline metrics actually predicted A/B test outcomes.

evidence.claim: Completed LangChain for LLM Application Development certification
Collaborates with PMs to define optimization targets

evidence.claim: Proficient in LoRA, OpenCV, RAG, pgvector, FAISS, Embeddings, Sentence Transformers, Weaviate, Qdrant, Elasticsearch, and BM25
